calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Dividng And Modifying Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Veronica Cerruti for (trustee) Martha Conte.

The Court stated that this is a petition to divide and modify a trust, that the Guardian ad Litem submitted a statement of no impact but it does not give her consent. Ms. Cerruti stated that the statement has been changed but not filed yet and provided a copy to the Court for review. The Court granted the petition for order dividing and modifying the irrevocable trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
